verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The cruelest word, The coldest heart The deepest wound, The endless dark The lonely ache, The burning tears The bitter nights The wasted years

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Life breaks and falls apart but we know these are…

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Places where grace Is soon to be so amazing It may be unfulfilled It may be unrestored But when anything that's shattered Is laid before the Lord Just watch and see, It will not be unredeemed

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For every choice that led to shame And all the love that never came For every vow that someone broke And every life that gave up hope

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Will leave in the shadow of fall But the cross says, these are all…

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Places where grace Is soon to be so amazing It may be unfulfilled It may be unrestored But when anything that's shattered Is laid before the Lord Just watch and see It will not be unredeemed

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh he will wipe every tear Will not be, Be unredeemed

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Places where grace Is soon to be so amazing It may be unfulfilled It may be unrestored But you never know the miracle the Father has in store Just watch and see, it will not be Just watch and see, It will not be unredeemed
